trust.heading: Safe & Trustworthy

ai.title: AI-Assisted, Never a Replacement
ai.description: MedBuddy provides reminders and information, not medical diagnoses or advice. Always follow your doctor's instructions.

privacy.title: Your Data is Encrypted
privacy.description: All personal health data is encrypted and stored securely. We never share it with third parties.

access.title: Works in Your Browser, No App Needed
access.description: Open your browser and start using it — no downloads or installations required.

trust.disclaimer: MedBuddy is a medication reminder tool, not a medical device. It does not provide diagnosis, treatment, or medical advice. Please consult a healthcare professional for any health concerns.

items.question: Can MedBuddy replace my doctor's advice?
items.answer: No. MedBuddy is a medication reminder and information tool. It does not provide medical diagnoses or advice. Always follow your doctor's instructions for all medication decisions.

items.question: Is it free to use?
items.answer: MedBuddy is currently completely free. We may introduce premium features in the future, but core features like medication reminders, prescription scanning, and caretaker connection will remain free.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: All data is encrypted during transmission and storage. We never share your personal health information with any third party.

items.question: How does my caregiver connect to my account?
items.answer: You can generate a unique invite code from your profile page and share it with your family. Once they enter the code, they can view your medication adherence. You can unlink at any time.

items.question: Can I use it even if I'm not tech-savvy?
items.answer: Absolutely! MedBuddy is designed for seniors with large text, big buttons, and simple navigation. You can also receive reminders via Telegram without even opening a web page.
